description: Represents a Defendant for cps channel

surname.description: Surname or Organisation name if forenames not present max 50 characters

forenames.description: Multiple space seperated forenames upto a total of 50 characaters

dob.description: Only passed if present, never passed for Organisation. Date type

ouCode.description: OUcode  of the court for the defendants next hearing or most recent hearing if there is no future hearing
